title: prunus avium subsp. cerasus
intro: Prunus avium subsp. cerasus, also known as sour cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Prunus genus. The medicinal properties of Prunus avium subsp. cerasus include its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming sour cherry include reducing inflammation and pain, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Prunus avium subsp. cerasus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and dried fruit infusions, and is also used in jams, preserves, and juices due to its tart flavor and potential health benefits.
